EPIGRAL:
Fluid code: 2-4 uppercase letters ONLY (e.g. SOL, CHBR, BPA, PRO). Do NOT include leading line numbers or area numbers like 101 or 80 in Fluid Code.
Sequence number: 4-6 digit number.
Line size: 1-3 digit number (mm).
Pipe class: 2-5 alphanumeric characters (e.g. B2, A2, B1).
Insulation: 1-2 letters (optional).
Delimiter: '-'.
Order: FluidCode-SequenceNo-LineSize-PipeClass-Insulation.
Rule: Trim all unwanted surrounding text or appended line size numbers from Fluid Code and Pipe Class.
